treatment_information.treatment_response: Histological examination showed syncitial cells with round to oval nuclei, small solitary nucleoli, and a whorling pattern characteristic of meningioma. Mitotic figures were not detected.

treatment_timeline.event: Admission to the Ophthalmology Department of Iida Municipal Hospital with keratitis of the right eye and severe bilateral corneal inflammation.

patient_outcome.final_status: Independent in daily activities, no further problems with her eyes.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: At 18 months after resection of the meningioma, the patient remains independent in daily activities, and has had no further problems with her eyes.
